rationale.root_cause: The response points to src/be_strlib.c and an off-by-one in be_pushvfstr, not src/be_code.c:578 where the actual defect resides. It does not mention code_not or the missing unaryexp(OP_MOVE) before swapping t/f.
rationale.local_fix: It proposes changing a length in be_strlib.c, not adding unaryexp(finfo, OP_MOVE, e) at src/be_code.c:578 as required by the patch. Therefore it does not provide the correct local change at the correct site.
rationale.global_fix: Its reasoning explains an unrelated formatting bug, not why code_not needs to materialize the expression into a register before inverting branches. It fails to address the underlying cause in be_code.c.
